title: bischofia trifoliata
intro: Bischofia trifoliata, also known as the treelung or kamanomana, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bischofia trifoliata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Bischofia trifoliata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
